'''鈭歠-n-th''' ('''fanatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unacknowledge|unacknowledge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unacknowledge|unacknowledge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-n-th
|-
! Lemma
| fanatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fanathithi|fanathithi]] || [[word:fanathiji|fanathiji]] || [[word:fanathishi|fanathishi]] || [[word:fanathi|fanathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanathuthuth|fanathuthuth]] || [[word:fanathujuj|fanathujuj]] || [[word:fanathushush|fanathushush]] || [[word:fanath|fanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanathuthu|fanathuthu]] || [[word:fanathuju|fanathuju]] || [[word:fanathushu|fanathushu]] || [[word:fanathu|fanathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanathufuth|fanathufuth]] || [[word:fanathufuj|fanathufuj]] || [[word:fanathufush|fanathufush]] || [[word:fanathuf|fanathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fanathethe|fanathethe]] || [[word:fanatheje|fanatheje]] || [[word:fanatheshe|fanatheshe]] || [[word:fanathe|fanathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanathothoth|fanathothoth]] || [[word:fanathojoj|fanathojoj]] || [[word:fanathoshosh|fanathoshosh]] || [[word:fanath|fanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanathotho|fanathotho]] || [[word:fanathojo|fanathojo]] || [[word:fanathosho|fanathosho]] || [[word:fanatho|fanatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanathofoth|fanathofoth]] || [[word:fanathofoj|fanathofoj]] || [[word:fanathofosh|fanathofosh]] || [[word:fanathof|fanathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fanath忙th忙|fanath忙th忙]] || [[word:fanath忙j忙|fanath忙j忙]] || [[word:fanath忙sh忙|fanath忙sh忙]] || [[word:fanath忙|fanath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanathathath|fanathathath]] || [[word:fanathajaj|fanathajaj]] || [[word:fanathashash|fanathashash]] || [[word:fanath|fanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanathatha|fanathatha]] || [[word:fanathaja|fanathaja]] || [[word:fanathasha|fanathasha]] || [[word:fanatha|fanatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanathafath|fanathafath]] || [[word:fanathafaj|fanathafaj]] || [[word:fanathafash|fanathafash]] || [[word:fanathaf|fanathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fanathasha|fanathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofanathasha|gofanathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifanathasha|gokifanathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fanathn眉sha|fanathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofanathnkn眉sha|gofanathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifanathn眉sha|gokifanathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fanathsh毛sha|fanathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofanathnksh毛sha|gofanathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifanathsh毛sha|gokifanathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fanathrosha|fanathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofanathnkrosha|gofanathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifanathrosha|gokifanathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fanathmusha|fanathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofanathnkmusha|gofanathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifanathmusha|gokifanathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fanathsherasha|fanathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofanathnksherasha|gofanathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifanathsherasha|gokifanathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fanathngasha|fanathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofanathnkngasha|gofanathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifanathngasha|gokifanathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fanathyasha|fanathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofanathnkyasha|gofanathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifanathyasha|gokifanathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fanathyamasha|fanathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofanathnkyamasha|gofanathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifanathyamasha|gokifanathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fanathn眉sh毛sha|fanathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofanathnkn眉sh毛sha|gofanathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifanathn眉sh毛sha|gokifanathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fanathn眉rosha|fanathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofanathnkn眉rosha|gofanathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifanathn眉rosha|gokifanathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fanathn眉musha|fanathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofanathnkn眉musha|gofanathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifanathn眉musha|gokifanathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fanathsh毛n眉sha|fanathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofanathnksh毛n眉sha|gofanathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifanathsh毛n眉sha|gokifanathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fanathsh毛rosha|fanathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofanathnksh毛rosha|gofanathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifanathsh毛rosha|gokifanathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fanathsh毛musha|fanathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofanathnksh毛musha|gofanathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifanathsh毛musha|gokifanathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fanathron眉sha|fanathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofanathnkron眉sha|gofanathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifanathron眉sha|gokifanathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fanathrosh毛sha|fanathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofanathnkrosh毛sha|gofanathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifanathrosh毛sha|gokifanathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fanathromusha|fanathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofanathnkromusha|gofanathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifanathromusha|gokifanathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fanathmun眉sha|fanathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofanathnkmun眉sha|gofanathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifanathmun眉sha|gokifanathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fanathmush毛sha|fanathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofanathnkmush毛sha|gofanathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifanathmush毛sha|gokifanathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fanathmurosha|fanathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofanathnkmurosha|gofanathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifanathmurosha|gokifanathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fanath|fanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙n忙th|f忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofanath|hofanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙n忙th|hof忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofanath|hohofanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙n忙th|hohof忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fanath|n眉fanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙n忙th|n眉f忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fanath|n眉n眉fanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙n忙th|n眉n眉f忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fanath|n茂fanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙n忙th|n茂f忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fanath|n茂n茂fanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙n忙th|n茂n茂f忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufanath|lufanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙n忙th|luf忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufanath|lulufanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙n忙th|luluf忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifanath|lifanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙n忙th|lif忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifanath|lilifanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙n忙th|lilif忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofanath|kofanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙n忙th|kof忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofanath|kokofanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙n忙th|kokof忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefanath|kefanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙n忙th|kef忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefanath|kekefanath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙n忙th|kekef忙n忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
